name: Synup or BrightLocal: Which Fits Agencies Better?
hero_main_title: Paying 2-3x more to consistently update your listings? There’s a better way!
hero_summary: BrightLocal works for freelancers and small businesses that only need audits and reports. Synup is built for agencies that want to scale client services, grow revenue, and maintain full control of their data.
counter_text_1: say they effortlessly increased store visits
counter_text_2: of businesses increased their online conversions year-over-year
counter_text_3: businesses seamlessly listed across key online platforms
new_heading: Why Synup Stands Out Over BrightLocal
new_summary: BrightLocal is primarily a reporting tool. Synup is a complete operating system that helps you win clients, manage accounts, and deliver across listings, SEO, reviews, and social. Here’s where Synup puts you ahead.
section_2_slider_1_summary: Synup OS is designed around agency operations, API-driven, and ready to scale across multiple clients. You get automation that saves hours, full ownership of your data, and flexible modules that adapt as your agency grows.
section_2_slider_2_summary: BrightLocal shows you where listings are inconsistent, but Synup lets you fix them directly. With bulk Google verification, aggregator distribution, multi-location reports, and automatic rejection of incorrect edits, your clients’ data stays accurate and visible in real search results.
section_2_step_3_summary: BrightLocal offers basic monitoring, while Synup gives you AI-assisted review management. Respond faster with ready-to-use templates, handle every client from a unified inbox, and benefit from fair pricing that makes sense for agencies scaling up.
section_2_slider_4_summary: BrightLocal delivers audits and rank tracking. Synup takes the next step with voice search optimization, keyword and grid rank tracking, and hyper-local campaigns that adapt to triggers like time, weather, and events. This gives your clients better reach and more relevant visibility.
section_3_heading: Where Synup Beats BrightLocal for Agencies
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Synup vs BrightLocal: What Agencies Gain
why_choose_tab_desc_1: BrightLocal focuses on generating audits and rank reports for single businesses. Synup OS gives agencies a centralized dashboard where you can manage multiple clients and locations at once, filter by rep or region, and track delivery from a single place.
why_choose_tab_desc_2: BrightLocal identifies issues but leaves the fixes to you. Synup OS goes further with bulk Google verifications, automated directory syncs, and direct listing updates across hundreds of sites. Instead of just seeing problems, you solve them at scale.
why_choose_tab_title_3: Flexible Modules Instead of Rigid Packages
why_choose_tab_desc_3: BrightLocal sells audits, rank trackers, and review tools as separate add-ons. Synup OS lets you activate only the modules your clients need, from listings and reviews to SEO and social, without locking you into limited bundles.
why_choose_content_title: Synup: The Epitome of Digital Optimization
why_choose_content_summary: Transform Your Digital Strategy with Synup – Experience the Difference.
testimonial_summary: Boost your online presence effortlessly with Synup's Local Listings Management. List, optimize, and monitor profiles on Google, Facebook, Yelp, and premium partner sites. Ensure consistency across search, local, voice, and social platforms. Access detailed analytics for informed decision-making. Take charge of your brand image by controlling displayed information. Synup: Where online success begins with seamless listing management.
customer_review_1_summary: Synup empowered us to drive 20% more revenue through profile personalization - the numbers speak for themselves!
customer_review_2_name: Adrian Boysell CEO of Adrian Graphics & Marketing
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is a game-changer. Every multi-location business needs to use this service.
